series_metadata.series_description: All forms, reports and photographs generated during the investigation of an Aircraft Crash. (HP-3A)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain on hard copy until scanned and indexed into the Document Storage System. Once quality review is completed by Central Records the hard copy can be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain reports on the Document Storage System for five years plus the current year then delete. Aircraft Crash Reports unique in nature or high profile will be retained permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
